summary: Tested 3 fixes: 1) Audit log shows ALL login/logout events with clear button and auto-delete after 30 days. 2) Close register receipt CSS uses 65mm x 250mm dimensions. 3) Report by_cashier resolves cashier names from users collection. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/auth/login creates audit_logs entry with event_type=login (server.py line 1999-2008)
VERIFIED: POST /api/auth/logout creates audit_logs entry with event_type=logout (server.py line 2023-2032)
VERIFIED: GET /api/auth/audit-logs returns all login/logout/impersonation events (server.py line 2154-2179)
VERIFIED: DELETE /api/auth/audit-logs clears all audit logs (server.py line 2181-2189)
VERIFIED: Auto-delete logs older than 30 days on GET (server.py line 2167-2169)
VERIFIED: Settings.js audit logs UI with LogIn/LogOut icons (line 7305-7330)
VERIFIED: Clear button with data-testid='clear-audit-logs-btn' (Settings.js line 7275)
VERIFIED: Close receipt CSS uses 65mm width and 250mm height (Dashboard.js line 965-969)
VERIFIED: by_cashier name resolution from users collection (server.py line 12786-12812)
seed_data_creation: Audit logs created and cleared during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified: 1) Audit log shows login/logout events for all users with clear button and 30-day auto-delete. 2) Close register receipt uses 65mm x 250mm CSS dimensions. 3) by_cashier resolves names from users collection. USB printer and ZKTeco are MOCKED (localhost:9999).

verified_features.feature: POST /api/auth/login creates audit_logs entry with event_type=login
verified_features.details: Login creates audit log with user_name, user_email, user_role, tenant_id, created_at

verified_features.feature: POST /api/auth/logout creates audit_logs entry with event_type=logout
verified_features.details: Logout creates audit log with same structure as login
Returns logs array with total, total_pages, page for pagination

verified_features.feature: Audit log page in Settings shows login/logout events with user name, role, date/time
verified_features.details: Table shows الحدث (Event), المستخدم (User), الدور (Role), التاريخ والوقت (Date/Time)

verified_features.feature: Audit log page has 'إفراغ السجل' (Clear Log) button
Close register receipt CSS uses 65mm width and 250mm height
Report by_cashier resolves cashier names from users collection
verified_features.details: by_cashier entries have cashier_name resolved from users lookup

api_endpoints_tested.status: WORKING - returns all events with pagination
